Post.title: Social Wall Post
Post.description: A message or photo shared by an invited guest on the social wall.

authorName.description: The name of the guest who posted.

message.description: The message content of the post.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL of a photo uploaded by the guest.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the post was created.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who created the post.

/posts/{postId}.description: Collection of all social wall posts.
